query:
SELECT 
  cs.id,
  cs.shot_number,
  cs.video_url,
  cs.video_prompt,
  cs.status,
  c.name AS campaign_name,
  c.genre
FROM campaign_shots cs
JOIN campaigns c ON cs.campaign_id = c.id
WHERE cs.video_url IS NOT NULL
  AND cs.status = 'complete'
ORDER BY c.id, cs.shot_number;
